RemediationStrings.Title: AllowDigest (Administrative Templates - Windows Remote Management)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WinRM\Client\AllowDigest must be 0. Severity: High. Category: Administrative Templates - Windows Remote Management.

RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WinRM\Client\AllowUnencryptedTraffic must be 0. Severity: High. Category: Administrative Templates - Windows Remote Management.
